front.title: Secure Object Transfer for RESTful Provisioning Protocol (RPP)

abstract.t: This document describes how OAuth 2.0 [RFC6749] can be used to secure object transfers in RESTful Provisioning Protocol (RPP) [I-D.ietf-rpp-core]. It extends the RPP OAuth 2.0 authorization model defined in [I-D.wullink-rpp-oauth2] with mechanisms specific to federated object transfers.
